headline: Will New 23-Hour Trading and Tokenization Efforts Change Nasdaq's (NDAQ) Market-Structure Narrative?
summary: Nasdaq recently halted trading in TJGC Group Limited shares pending additional company information, while also filing procedural Form 144 notices for potential resale of restricted stock through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC in 2025 and 2026. At the same time, Nasdaq has moved to a 23-hour trading model, introduced a fast-entry rule for megacaps into the Nasdaq-100, and is positioning itself as a key player in tokenized stock trading as the SEC develops an innovation exemption...
